title: Sisters Wyrd · the loom
notes: Entries reveal when their token lands in GauntletState.lore_tokens_revealed (hosts emit on finished; conditional tokens per manifest). Schema matches pirate_summer/scrapbook.json.

entries.title: The sisters, met
entries.blurb: Four sisters, four knots, one loom in the back room that the shop pretends is a display piece. You unwove what let itself be unwoven.

entries.title: Four times the thesis verb
entries.blurb: Every sister, unwoven. The game's whole argument, executed in full: some things are only holdable by letting them go four different ways.

entries.title: The four unlabeled points
entries.blurb: The loom has eight points. Four have names. You saw the other four. Morgan le Fey reads THIS in your fortune at the Faire, which should not be possible.

entries.title: One hex past the edge
entries.blurb: You pushed into the shimmer three times and it stopped pretending. Your own hoofprints, already there. The territory repeats. It is not a figure of speech.
